svg.text: Now you may have noticed that when we jump underneath a solid platform, we were able to pass right through it and appear on top? Well, this was because the touching- ground script assumed we were always falling and that if we touched the ground then that must have been our feet, so it moved us up out of the ground... However, if we were jumping and thus moving up, then it would actually be our head that touches the ground, not our feet, and so moving us up out of the ground actually causes us to hit our head and then be moved up above the thing we hit! What we need to do when we touch the ground is move our player 'up' if we were falling, and 'down' if we were jumping!
